title: amaryllis × macrantha
intro: Amaryllis × macrantha, also known as the Belladonna Lily or Cape Lily, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family and is known for its showy, trumpet-shaped flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Amaryllis × macrantha include its potential to treat various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
